REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE AND DECLARATION OF CATHERINE W. DELOREY IN SUPPORT OF SHAMROCK STRUCTURES, INC.'S OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR DECLARATION OF RIGHTS TO WITHHELD FUNDS FILED BY RESPONDENT SHAMROCK STRUCTURES, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER B L & K ENTERPRISES, INC'S PETITION TO DETERMINE RIGHTS TO WITHHELD FUNDS [CIVIL CODE SECTION 3201]. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. SEPTEMBER 29, 2008 LETTER REFERS TO "SUBSTANTIAL COMPLETION" NOT FINAL COMPLETION. ROSE FAILS TO SHOW THAT THERE HAS BEEN A CESSATION, I.E., A COMPLETE WORK STOPPAGE ON THE PUBLIC WORK. SEE W.F. HAYWARD CO. V. TRANSAMERICA INS. CO. (1993) 16 CAL.APP.4TH 1101. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition Top Detemine Rights To Withheld Funds
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER B L & K ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA ROSE CONSTRUCTION'S Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds [Civil Code Section 3201].
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. SEPTEMBER 29, 2008 LETTER REFERS TO "SUBSTANTIAL COMPLETION" NOT FINAL COMPLETION. ROSE FAILS TO SHOW THAT THERE HAS BEEN A CESSATION, I.E., A COMPLETE WORK STOPPAGE ON THE PUBLIC WORK. SEE W.F. HAYWARD CO. V. TRANSAMERICA INS. CO. (1993) 16 CAL.APP.4TH 1101. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW/PB) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
